meaning: n.(鱼等的)卵,(植物)菌丝,产物v.产卵
examples: Despite living in different waters, all eels spawn in the sea.
Nobody knows how they do it with such accuracy, or why eels spawn where they do.
The light comes from female firefly squids, which spawn in spring, then die and wash ashore.
Bad regulations are always at the root of black markets and the criminality they spawn.
And if the film is popular enough, horror movies can spawn their own franchises.
